text:
Biblia nye Yudat…Ēwo, Kristot…Ēwo ∆íe hame vovoawo kpakple ha si woy…Ēna be "Eastern Orthodox" hame le yevugbe me la ∆íe agbalŠļĹ veviet…Ē na sub…Ēsub…Ē. Vovototo suea …Ėewo le hasiawo ∆íe Bibliawo me.

E čegbe nye E čeawo ∆íe gbe siwo dona. Wo dona E čegbe le Ghana kple Togo kpakple Benin D√£humey duk…Ē siwo le Afrika ∆íe …£eto…Ėo∆íe l…Ē∆ío la me. Gbe dodo siwo te…Ėe E čegbe Ňču wonye F…ĒŐÉgbe kpakple Adz√°gbe. Esiawo kat√£ wonye Gbe siwo do∆íome kple ∆≤egbe.

title: Ephraim Amu
text:
Ephraim K…Ēku Amu nye Ghana hakpalawo ta t…Ē …Ėeka kpakple nufiala. E∆íe ha nyanyet…Ē …Ėeka ye nye "Yen Ara Asase Ni" si ∆íe g…Ēme…Ėe…Ėe le E čegbe me enye "Mia denyigba l…ĒŐÉl…ĒŐÉ la".

∆Čevime kple sukudede
Wodzi Ephraim le Peki-Avetile le Any…Ēny…Ē 13 le ∆íe 1899 me. Esi w√≤nye Ku…Ėagbe wodzii ta woy…Ēe be K…Ēku. E∆íe dzilawo ∆íe Ňčk…Ēwo nye Stephen Amuyaa kple Sarah Akoram. »†k…Ē nyany…õ si woy…Ēna na fofoa enye Papa Stefano. Papa Stefano nye a…ĖaŇčuw…Ēla eye wonye nukpala. Wode mawutsi ta na Ephraim Amu le ∆Üktoba 22 lia le ∆íe 1899 dzi. Os…Ēfo Rudolf Mallet enye amesi de mawutsi ta n…õe. 

K…Ēku Ephraim dze g…Ēmedzesuku g…Ēme le Dame le ∆íe 1906 me. Eyi Peki Blengo titina suku esime wox…Ē ∆íe wuieve. Ekp…Ē dzidz…Ē le hadzidzi kple agblede nus…Ēsr…Ē Ňčuti vevie eyata ebia tso wo∆íe nufiala Karl Ntem si be woafia saŇčku ∆ío∆ío ye. ńźo…Ėo si n…Ē eya kple nufiala Ntem dome enye be Ephraim  K…Ēku ade agble na A∆íet…Ē Ntem le Memle…Ėagbewo ekema nufiala haÕā afia saŇčku∆ío∆íoe. K…Ēku wu e∆íe titina suku nu le ∆íe 1915 me eye wox…Ē …Ėase…Ėigbal…õ. Wu esia la, ekp…Ē dzidzedze le Abetifi Nufialawohe∆íe dodokp…Ē si wow…Ē la me eyata le ∆Ďe 1916 ∆íe g…Ēmedzedze le Dzove me la eya kple ehati eve bubu dze  m…Ē yi Abetifi.
 
Wo∆íe m…Ēz…Ēz…Ē tso Peki yi Abetifi nye agbadro∆íe alafa …Ėeka kple blaat…Ē ∆íe az…Ēli. Le m…Ēz…Ēz…Ē sia me la, ehiaÕā be woat…Ē adzudz…Ē le m…Ēta. Wot…Ē …Ėe duwo me abe Koforidua, Nkawkaw, Asubone kple ObomeŇč.
Esi  K…Ēku …Ėo suku la ekp…Ē be sukuhati a…Ėewo doa gas…Ē eyata eya haÕā …Ėoe kplikpa be yeakpa atis…Ē na ye…Ėokui. Le nyate∆íe me la, ekpa s…Ē sia haÕā  vava eye wo…Ėi …Ėase be sukutat…Ē Stern ∆íe vi g…Ē haÕā kp…Ē gome le atis…Ē sia dodo me.  Amu gayi dzi kpa abo na sukua …Ėe abo si wod…Ēna tso ablotsi la te∆íe.
 
Ephraim  K…Ēku Amu wu e∆íe hehe nu le ∆íe 1919 me. Abe nufiala yeye la, ele na Amu be woagbl…Ē Mawunya eye woana kaklanya e∆íe nufialawo kple  hamea le ehatiwo ∆íe Ňčk…Ē me. Amu tia e∆íe mawunya tso Mateo ∆íe agbale me. Mateo  Ta 25 kpukpui 40. E∆íe nyati na Kwasi…Ėa Mawunya sia enye, ‚ÄúA∆íet…Ē la a…Ėo mia∆íe nugbegblewo te∆íe na mi le esi migblee …Ėe …Ėevi siawo ta‚ÄĚ. Egbl…Ē e∆íe mawunya la le E čegbe kple Akuapem me.
Le wo∆íe suku nu wuwu me la  čuwo va de ha vie eyata en…Ē b…Ēb…Ēe na Amu be woa…Ėo  ču tso Abetifi va Osino eye tso afima ets…Ē keteke va …Ėi …Ėe Koforidua hafi ts…Ē  ču …Ėo Frankadua. Ke esi wo…Ėo Frankadua la ehia be woaz…Ē af…Ē yi  a∆íe.

E∆íe d…Ēw…Ēw…Ē kple hawo
Tso Yanuar gbat…Ē 1920 la , Amu dze d…Ē g…Ēme abe nufiala le Peki Blengo E.P. Titina suku me.  Esi hadzidzi doa dzidz…Ē n…õ ta la e…Ėoe kplikpa be yea fia ha sukuviawo ale be woate Ňču aŇčl…Ē eye woadzi ha …Ėe …Ėo…Ėo alo noti nu. Le esia w…Ēw…Ē me la, eyi Koforidua …Ėa∆íle kasaŇčku adodoe si woy…Ēna be Henry Riley saŇčku. Ede saŇčku sia  ču va…Ėo Frankadua gake ele n…õ be woats…Ē saŇčku sia …Ėe ta tso Frankadua va …Ėo Peki. Ke esia mesese na K…Ēku Amu kura o. Eya kple m…Ēz…Ēla …Ėeka si woy…Ēna be A∆íet…Ē Lo la w…Ē m…Ēz…Ēz…Ē sia z√£ blibo la kat√£ eye Amu …Ėo Peki le f…ĒŇčli kple saŇčku la le e∆íe ta. 
Esi nus…Ēsr…Ē meti k…Ē na Tata Amu o ta, edi be yeaga sr…Ē saŇčku ∆ío∆ío ale be woama …Ėo memie na ye eyata eyi Os…Ēfo Allotei Pappoe amesi nye nutome Os…Ēfo na Met…Ēdist hamea la gb…Ē be woafia saŇčku ∆ío∆ío ye.
Le ∆íe 1926 me la wo do Amu …Ėe Ňčg…Ē eyata wohi√£ be woa…Ėee yi Akr…Ēp…ĒŇč nufialawo te∆íe abe nufiala ene. Le afisia la ame ge…Ėewo kp…Ē Tata Amu ∆íe nuw…Ēna abe movinu. Abe nufiala si kp…Ēa agbledenyawo dzii la, ebia tso sukuviwo si be woats…Ē af…Ēdzi ado nukuwo abe nunyronu gake esia medze nusr…Ēlawo Ňču o, elabe wobui be mele na agbal…õnyala be woade asi mi Ňčuti o. Ke amu Ňčut…Ē fia kp…Ē…ĖeŇču wo. Eya Ňčut…Ē l…Ēa mi la yina …Ėe agble la me hedoa nukuawo. Togb…Ē be sukuviawo lia li čili či haÕā la wokpl…Ēn…õ …Ėo le d…Ēa w…Ēw…Ē me. 
 
Amu x…Ē …Ėe ameyib…Ē nuw…Ēw…Ē dzi ale gbegbe be e∆íe tsinonu kekeake ha nye tre. Esr…Ē Akuapemgbe akuaku tso e∆íe hadzihamen…Ēlawo gb…Ē.  Tso 1927 la, Tata Amu …Ėoe kplikpa be ameyib…Ēwudodowo koe anye ye∆íe nudodo. E…Ėoe be yemaga do yevuwu titri siwo na wodzea fifia la le ameyib…Ē nyigba dzi o. 
 
Tata Amu to e∆íe a…ĖaŇčuw…Ēw…Ē me kpa ab…õ tso pamplo me. Ey…Ē esiawo be Odurogya, odurogyaba kple at…õt…õnb…õn. Amu kpa ha ge…Ėe siwo domet…Ē a…Ėewo nye

Book of Common Prayer 
I believe in God the Father Almighty, Maker of heaven and earth;

And in Jesus Christ his only Son our Lord,
Who was conceived by the Holy Ghost,
Born of the Virgin Mary,
Suffered under Pontius Pilate,
Was crucified, dead, and buried,
He descended into hell;
The third day he rose again from the dead,
He ascended into heaven,
And sitteth on the right hand of God the Father Almighty;
From thence he shall come to judge the quick and the dead.

I believe in the Holy Ghost;
The holy Catholick Church;
The Communion of Saints;
The Forgiveness of sins;
The Resurrection of the body,
And the life everlasting.
Amen.

Common Worship 
I believe in God, the Father almighty,
creator of heaven and earth.

I believe in Jesus Christ, his only Son, our Lord,
who was conceived by the Holy Spirit,
born of the Virgin Mary,
suffered under Pontius Pilate,
was crucified, died, and was buried;
he descended into hell.
On the third day he rose again;
he ascended into heaven,
he is seated at the right hand of the Father,
and he will come to judge the living and the dead.

I believe in the Holy Spirit,
the holy catholic Church,
the communion of saints,
the forgiveness of sins,
the resurrection of the body,
and the life everlasting.
Amen.

Saturday 8th December, 2018 saw a successful Ampe Sports tournament organized by Hon. Alfred Adjei (Accra Metropolitan Assembly Presiding Member) for the Avenor Electoral Areas comprising Manmomon, Caprice, Kwadjoman and otaten. The Event was in partnership with Be-Great Promotions which is the official organization mandated to manage Ampe Sports tournament across all levels. With a large range of spectators, Otaten team through their indefatigable performance recorded the historic success of winning the first ever Ampe Sports competition organize in the City of Accra, Ghana.
